chat.welcome:
Hey! I'm Melisso 🐱 Victor's cat — and his best friend!
He brought me here to help you get to know his work. Ask me anything about projects, experience, or skills!
chat.limitReached: You've reached the message limit for this session. Come back later! 🐱
chat.errorMessage: Oops, something went wrong. Try again in a few seconds 🐱
